data.content: Implementation verified complete on main. All token usage tracking code is in place: types (agent-history-types.ts), extraction (agent-token-usage.ts for Codex turn.completed), beat-scoped persistence (interaction-logger.ts logTokenUsage), parsing (agent-history-parse.ts parseTokenUsageLine), aggregation (agent-history.ts mergeTokenUsage), and UI display (agent-history-beat-detail.tsx BeatTokenUsageList). Quality gates: lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 2361 tests passed. Key commits already on main: bdc3d7fa (Track per-agent beat token usage), 9eeae9e2 (Merge branch foolery-81ad).
